_description: Optional Linear integration config. Copy to state/linear.json and fill in. Commander uses this ONLY if at least one repo has ticket_trigger=linear. Requires the Linear MCP server to be installed at the Claude Code level (run: claude mcp add linear). The exact Linear MCP tool names Hydra depends on are listed in docs/linear-tool-contract.md — an operator with credentials MUST validate that contract against their Linear MCP install before relying on Hydra's Linear path.

_trigger_types.assignee: Pick up issues assigned to the Linear user matching 'me' (the token holder)
_trigger_types.state: Pick up issues in a specific state — set value to the Linear state name like 'Ready for Hydra' or 'Todo'
_trigger_types.label: Pick up issues with a specific label — set value to the label name

repo_mapping._description: Map Linear team to GitHub repo(s) — when Hydra picks up a Linear issue, it needs to know which local repo to clone/worktree for the fix.

state_name_mapping._description: Optional — if your Linear team uses non-default state names (e.g. 'Code Review' instead of 'In Review'), map the logical name (used in state_transitions below) to the actual Linear state name for this team. Hydra applies this mapping before calling the Linear MCP update-issue tool. Leave empty to use state_transitions values verbatim.

state_transitions._description: Which Linear state to transition the issue to at each phase. Leave an individual field empty/null to skip that transition. Values are logical names; per-team overrides go in teams[].state_name_mapping.
